HELIOS - HomogEneous and Layered medIa Optical Scattering
C++ surface integral equation (SIE) code for homogeneous and layered media scattering

28class LookupTable {
29 public:
30 std::vector<std::vector<dcmplx>> arg;
31 std::vector<std::vector<dcmplx>> fun;
32 int sizeRe;
33 int sizeIm;
34 double maxRe;
35 double maxIm;
36 double incRe;
37 double incIm;
38
39 // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
40 // Construction & lifetime
41 // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
45 LookupTable();
46
52 LookupTable(std::string fileName);
53};

87// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
88// Symmetry operations
89// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
91
95class SymmetryOperation {
96 public:
98 virtual ~SymmetryOperation(){};
99
105 virtual rvec Apply(rvec inputVector) = 0;
106};
107
109
113class Translation : public SymmetryOperation {
114 private:
115 rvec t;
116
117 public:
122 Translation(rvec translationVector);
123
129 virtual rvec Apply(rvec inputVector);
130};
131
132// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
133// Special functions
134// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
140dcmplx cerf(dcmplx arg);
141
147dcmplx cerfc(dcmplx arg);
148
154double Ei(const double &x);
155
162dcmplx Ep(const double &x, int p);
163
169int factorial(int num);
170
176cdyad transpose(cdyad d);
177
186template <class Type>
187void FillGreenTable(rvec r, rvec rp, Type (*greenFunction)(rvec, rvec)) {
188 std::cout << greenFunction(r, rp) << std::endl;
189}
190
191// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
192// Interpolation templates
193// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
204template <class Type>
205Type InterpLinear(double x0, Type i0, double x1, Type i1, float xp) {
206 return (x1 - xp) / (x1 - x0) * i0 + (xp - x0) / (x1 - x0) * i1;
207}
208
219template <class Type>
220Type InterpBilinear(double x0, double y0, Type i0,
221 double x1, double /*y1*/, Type i1,
222 double x2, double /*y2*/, Type i2,
223 double x3, double y3, Type i3,
224 double xp, double yp) {
225 // clang-format on
226 Type i01 = InterpLinear<Type>(x0, i0, x1, i1, xp);
227 Type i32 = InterpLinear<Type>(x3, i3, x2, i2, xp);
228
229 return InterpLinear<Type>(y0, i01, y3, i32, yp);
230}
231
246template <class Type>
247Type InterpTrilinear(double x0, double y0, double z0, Type i0,
248 double x1, double y1, double /*z1*/, Type i1,
249 double x2, double y2, double /*z2*/, Type i2,
250 double x3, double y3, double /*z3*/, Type i3,
251 double x4, double y4, double z4, Type i4,
252 double x5, double y5, double /*z5*/, Type i5,
253 double x6, double y6, double /*z6*/, Type i6,
254 double x7, double y7, double /*z7*/, Type i7,
255 double xp, double yp, double zp) {
256 // clang-format on
257 Type i0123 = InterpBilinear<Type>(x0, y0, i0, x1, y1, i1, x2, y2, i2, x3, y3,
258 i3, xp, yp);
259
260 Type i4567 = InterpBilinear<Type>(x4, y4, i4, x5, y5, i5, x6, y6, i6, x7, y7,
261 i7, xp, yp);
262
263 return InterpLinear<Type>(z0, i0123, z4, i4567, zp);
264}
265

279 double incRe, double incIm);

291 double incRe, double incIm);
